title: Update golang.org/x/sys to eeba5f6aabab
body:
To avoid cross compilation issues again we now vendor the latest
version of the sys package.

Refers to https://github.com/seccomp/containers-golang/pull/23#discussion_r355323842

comments.body: Same here. We need to stick on older versions because newer version of sys have those breaking changes which break compilation of docker/docker.
Ah, I see. Closing since this seems to be already the latest possible version here.
